title: Swidget's Hit Sounds
description: A lightweight mod that customizes Minecraft hit sounds, allowing you to replace default combat audio with cleaner, louder, or more satisfying sound effects.
body:
# Swidget's Custom Hit Sounds

Swidget's Custom Hit Sounds is a lightweight Minecraft mod that changes the default hit sounds played during combat. The mod is designed to make PvP and general gameplay feel more responsive by replacing vanilla hit audio with cleaner and more noticeable sound effects.

The mod focuses only on audio customization and does not modify combat mechanics, player damage, or gameplay balance. It is intended to improve the overall combat experience while remaining simple and lightweight.

## Features
- Replaces default Minecraft hit sounds
- Cleaner and more noticeable combat audio
- Lightweight and performance friendly
- Simple installation and configuration
- Compatible with supported 1.21.11 version

This mod is intended for audio customization only.
